Pain-point radarConnecting

The Idea Engine turns messy complaints into live SaaS signal.

用 Go + Kafka 持續抓取 Dcard、Reddit、App Store 與 transcript feeds，把「抱怨」 轉成可排序、可追蹤、可商業化的 product intelligence。

Total insights

--

Structured pain points saved in Postgres

Last 24h

--

Fresh opportunities pushed through the stream

Avg. potential

--

Waiting for source mix

Operating model

From ingestion to monetizable pattern

Focus on non-technical users doing clumsy manual work. Those workarounds are usually where the blue-ocean SaaS opportunities hide.

01

Ingestion

Dcard, Reddit, App Store RSS and transcript feeds normalize into one stream.

02

Intelligence

Gemini, Groq or mock analysis extracts pain point, workaround, score and feasibility.

03

Presentation

SSE pushes fresh insights into a live dashboard so you can watch new demand show up.

API

http://localhost:8080/api/stream

Waiting for the next event...

Featured

Highest-signal ideas right now

目前還沒有新的 pain point 進來。先啟動 backend、Kafka、Redis 和 Postgres，然後讓 ingestion loop 跑一輪。

Recurring themes

Pain points that keep showing up

這一區把近 7 天內的 insight 聚成重複主題，幫你從單點抱怨往市場需求靠近。

目前還沒有新的 pain point 進來。先啟動 backend、Kafka、Redis 和 Postgres，然後讓 ingestion loop 跑一輪。

Semantic explorer

Find adjacent pain points by meaning

輸入一句問題或 workflow，系統會用 embeddings 找出語意相近的痛點，而不是只做關鍵字比對。

Ready for vector search

Start with a workflow description, pain point, or customer quote to surface similar signals.

Live pain stream
